# Sanjib Das Portfolio

Sanjib Das is a graphic designer and AI ads creator from Kolkata, West Bengal, India.

Website: https://sanjibdas.vercel.app

Main services:
* AI UGC ads
* AI product ad creatives
* YouTube thumbnail design
* Product creatives
* Social media post design
* D2C brand creatives

Main pages:
* Homepage: https://sanjibdas.vercel.app/
* About Sanjib Das: https://sanjibdas.vercel.app/sanjib-das
* Works: https://sanjibdas.vercel.app/works
* Pricing: https://sanjibdas.vercel.app/pricing

Target audience:
Small brands, D2C brands, creators, startups, jewellery brands, skincare brands, beauty brands, fashion brands, and ecommerce brands.

Location:
Kolkata, West Bengal, India.
